name: Peacekeeping Mission Intake
description: Peacekeeping mission intake for UN peacekeeping personnel, troop-contributing country liaisons, and peace operations planners assessing or preparing a peacekeeping deployment. Evaluates the mission mandate, rules of engagement, host country consent, protection of civilians obligations, conduct and discipline requirements, and exit strategy to produce a peacekeeping mission profile with operational assessment and risk flags.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
